author: timhor
description: Manipulate sentences as a unit of movement.

manifest.author: Tim Hor & Andrew Brown
manifest.description: Manipulate sentences as a unit of movement. Select, move and delete by whole sentences.
manifest.name: Sentence Navigator

name: Sentence Navigator

releases.author: timhor
releases.description:
- New feature: select to start of sentence
- New feature: select to end of sentence
- Enhancement: if cursor is at the start of a list item, move to start of current sentence will jump to the start of the previous sentence (this makes it compatible with the [Outliner](https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner) plugin)

releases.author: timhor
releases.description:
- Enhancement: select current sentence will ignore markdown bullet/numbered list characters at the start of a line
- Bug fix: select current sentence no longer throws an error when performed on the last line (contributed by @lumitry)

releases.author: timhor
releases.description: - New feature: added setting to configure sentence regex

releases.author: timhor
releases.description: - Bug fix: move to start of next sentence works properly again
